circlet_of_logos.desc: Its former owner once fell into a cave and found the treasure trove of an exiled royal. This is a souvenir from that incident.
circlet_of_logos.title: Lucky Dog's Silver Circlet

flower_of_life.desc: A four-leaf clover that grows in the wild. It was picked because it is said to bring good luck.
flower_of_life.title: Lucky Dog's Clover

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: An exquisite metallic vessel that was once used to knock out a thief.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Lucky Dog's Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: A monster once cornered an adventurer, but was then picked off by a hunting eagle... That eagle dropped this feather, which now carries some of the adventurer's good luck.
plume_of_death.title: Lucky Dog's Eagle Feather

sands_of_eon.desc: A broken hourglass from which all the sand has escaped. But it's fine, because the passage of time means nothing to someone without a single worry in the whole world.
sands_of_eon.title: Lucky Dog's Hourglass

list.desc: One who is favored by fortune tends to experience at least their fair share of miracles.</br>The legendary four-leaf clover, for instance, is a precious find that brings luck to its bearer.</br>Once, while playing in the field, the carefree young boy known as Lucky Dog happened across just such a clover.</br>Delighted, he plucked it from the ground and put it in his pocket.</br>No one knows whether it was the clover which brought him his good fortune, or the other way around.</br>
list.title: Lucky Dog's Clover

list.desc: One who is favored by fortune can even find priceless treasures in the most deadly of traps.</br>While wandering around some ruins, the boy known as Lucky Dog accidentally fell into a deep pit.</br>He landed safely on a pile of dust. It turned out to be a mattress that over the years had gradually broken down, eventually turning to dust.</br>Just like that, Lucky Dog discovered a treasure trove left by the old aristocrats. This circlet came to epitomize his luck.</br>
list.title: Lucky Dog's Silver Circlet

list.desc: Once there was a child favored by fortune from the day he was born. Try as they might, even the most vicious bandits could not lay a finger on him. He became known as Lucky Dog.</br>The child grew up, and one day in the throes of adulthood he found himself stumbling drunk along the back alley behind the tavern.</br>Under the starless sky, a vicious bandit prepared to rob Lucky Dog, taking advantage of his compromised state.</br>But just as the bandit was about to strike, a flying goblet hit him square on the forehead, knocking him out cold.</br>Naturally, this makes Lucky Dog one of very few people known to have benefited, rather than suffered, from being in the vicinity of a tavern brawl.</br>
list.title: Lucky Dog's Goblet

list.desc: When fortune has your back, even the most ferocious monster has to yield.</br>Strolling in the forest, the boy known as Lucky Dog had no idea that a monster was lurking nearby, having singled him out as its prey.</br>The boy became distracted by some colorful mushrooms, and the monster pounced. He leaped out and landed on the poisonous mushrooms, stomping them flat.</br>This was going to be an easy hunt, the monster thought — until a feather from the eagle circling above fell quietly onto its back.</br>
list.title: Lucky Dog's Eagle Feather

list.desc: Even time itself could not leave a wrinkle on the face of the happy-go-lucky boy known as Lucky Dog.</br>Lucky Dog had no family, let alone children of his own.</br>But in the course of his life of good fortune, he considered all he met as his friends and family.</br>As his life was nearing its end, he saw an hourglass with sand flowing down, as if counting down his remaining time.</br>He simply chuckled, took a slingshot, and shattered the hourglass.</br>
list.title: Lucky Dog's Hourglass
